title: File
description: A File object represents a file in Notion. Files can be either hosted by Notion (type "file") or externally hosted (type "external").

file.description: Notion-hosted file details. Present when type is "file". These URLs expire after one hour.

url.description: The authenticated S3 URL for the file.

expiry_time.description: The expiration time of the URL.

external.description: External file details. Present when type is "external".

url.description: The URL of the externally hosted file.

caption.description: Caption for the file as rich text.
